signals.title: Nvidia is investing billions into this emerging technology that could change the AI industry
signals.summary: Photonics is considered to be a more efficient alternative to the current process of transferring data using electricity, which could be crucial to the AI boom.

signals.title: The company behind the White House’s UFC event says rivals ‘would kill’ for the opportunity. Critics say that’s a problem.
signals.summary: As work crews put up a temporary arena on the White House grounds for a UFC event next month tied to America’s 250th anniversary, supporters and critics of the event are in agreement that its prime placement in front of an American icon is an unprecedented opportunity for a company.

signals.title: Once you secure SPARK funds for transmission development, what comes next?
signals.summary: The success of DOE’s SPARK initiative will depend on how prepared organizations are to execute once the funding arrives, writes Al Eliasen, Spatial Business Systems CEO.

signals.title: Large-load customers can help commercialize new clean energy technology: CEBA
signals.summary: “In a lot of the partnerships that have been established around some of these technologies, it's really the tech companies that are taking on a lot of the risk,” Priya Barua, CEBA's senior director of utility partnerships and innovation, told Utility Dive.

signals.title: Entergy’s gas projects are one-third of MISO’s fast-track interconnection process
signals.summary: Roughly 70% of Entergy’s proposed capacity additions would serve planned data centers in Louisiana and Mississippi.

signals.title: Trump's Oman outburst throws 'Switzerland of the Middle East' into the spotlight
signals.summary: The Trump administration has threatened sanctions and military action against Oman, a longtime ally and close security partner.

signals.title: Mercedes-Benz may be shut out of U.S. market under bill aimed at Chinese automaker ownership
signals.summary: Mercedes-Benz's largest individual shareholder is BAIC, a Chinese state-owned automaker. Sources told CNBC that exemptions in the legislation would not apply.

signals.title: Iran war cost: Average U.S. household paying $450 more on gas and energy
signals.summary: Higher energy costs can force consumers to raid their savings and lean more into debt to cover expenses.

signals.title: Tokens or humans? The new corporate trade-off
signals.summary: AI is costing far more than companies expected, forcing CFOs into a new trade-off between tokens and humans and posing a risk the market hasn't priced in.

signals.title: Blue Origin warns of rocket explosion debris after failed New Glenn test at Cape Canaveral
signals.summary: Jeff Bezos' rocket maker suffered a setback on Thursday as its New Glenn rocket went up in flames.

signals.title: As SpaceX IPO nears, traders think it's a near-certainty Musk becomes the first trillionaire
signals.summary: With buzz about a record-shattering IPO for SpaceX, traders are confident Elon Musk will advance to trillionaire status before 2027.

signals.title: Infighting, court battles could put long-hyped air taxi breakthrough in jeopardy
signals.summary: Trump's eVTOL pilot program is giving the air taxi industry its validation, but legal battles have put investor sentiment on hold.

signals.title: SpaceX skeptics have added reason for concern after Musk comments diverge from IPO filing
signals.summary: In a post on X, Elon Musk offered details about SpaceX's deal with Anthropic that weren't included in the company's IPO prospectus.

signals.title: Roth IRA owners may need a second retirement account to claim the new Saver's Match
signals.summary: The Saver's Match program, which starts in 2027, is for lower- and moderate-income retirement savers — but Roth IRA owners may face a hurdle to get the money.

signals.title: Disney's ABC files early broadcast licenses renewal. FCC Chair vows to 'follow the facts'
signals.summary: Disney said it filed renewals for eight broadcast station licenses "under protest," after the FCC launched an early review years ahead of schedule.

signals.title: Kalshi is moving beyond prediction markets and into one of crypto's biggest trading lanes
signals.summary: Kalshi said offshore perpetuals grew from $28 trillion in annual volume in 2023 to more than $90 trillion in 2025.

signals.title: SentinelOne stock drops 6% as cyber firm trims headcount to boost AI investments
signals.summary: SentinelOne reported earnings after the bell Thursday and issued lackluster guidance for the current quarter and full-year.

signals.title: Fed Governor Michelle Bowman warns against hiking interest rates because of inflation spike
signals.summary: Bowman said reacting to the inflation surge, driven primarily by energy prices and tariffs, has proven ineffective.

signals.title: New Mexico has the nation’s best DER interconnection policy: report
signals.summary: The state received high marks for its robust energy storage interconnection framework, frequent public reports on its interconnection queue and incorporating IEEE’s technical standard for DER interconnections.

signals.title: Iran reportedly launches missiles as Trump mulls deal to pause war for two months
signals.summary: The latest military and economic actions come as President Trump insists he feels no pressure to make a deal with Iran before November's midterm elections.

signals.title: Student loan borrowers will have two new repayment options come July 1. Here's how to pick one
signals.summary: Starting July 1, millions of federal student loan holders will have two new ways to repay their debt. Here's what to know about the additional options.

signals.title: There's a record disconnect unfolding in the trading pits right now
signals.summary: The volatility spread between single stocks and the index makes a world of a difference for options traders.

signals.title: Dan Ives: Anthropic’s growth is 'just the tip of the spear' for AI rally
signals.summary: Ives' comments come as part of a wider prediction for the Nasdaq to top 30,000 points by 2027, reiterating his call from earlier interviews with CNBC.

signals.title: EU seeks to 'intensify' talks with U.S. on advanced cyber AI models, official tells CNBC, amid Mythos concerns
signals.summary: Anthropic's Mythos model, which has advanced cyber abilities, has prompted a wave of concern from governments and businesses.

signals.title: Hyperscalers didn’t set out to be power companies. The grid left them no choice.
signals.summary: The power gap left hyperscalers with no alternative but to take on utility-scale obligations and lock up gigawatts of generation, writes Peak Nano CMO Shaun Walsh.

signals.title: Oregon PUC approves PGE’s large-load tariff framework for data centers
signals.summary: The order shifts more infrastructure costs and interconnection obligations to hyperscale customers while positioning Oregon’s 2025 POWER Act as an early test of how states manage AI-driven load growth.

signals.title: MISO pushes back on utility complaint over competitive transmission bidding
signals.summary: The grid operator stopped short of taking a position on the complaint itself. States and consumer advocates oppose it, while at least one major data center company supports it.

signals.title: 'Our flavors are on the shelf': The evolution of Asian grocery beyond the 'ethnic aisle'
signals.summary: As interest in Asian flavors rises, mainstream grocery stores are incorporating more Asian groceries to work toward being a one-stop shop for all consumers.

signals.title: NATO chief says alliance ‘ready to defend every inch of Allied territory’ after Russian drone hits member state Romania
signals.summary: Romania’s president said the collision demands a “firm, coordinated, and appropriate response."

signals.title: Exxon warns oil inventories will hit dangerously low levels in weeks, forcing prices to shoot higher
signals.summary: The price of physical Brent oil cargoes will spike to $150 to $160 per barrel once inventories hit all-time lows, Exxon executive Neil Chapman said.

signals.title: Costco says it saw 'record-breaking' gas volumes amid rising prices
signals.summary: Costco saw "recording-breaking volumes" of gas sales and said rising fuel prices drove first-time members to its stations.

signals.title: Gap shares tumble 14% as retailer cuts sales guidance after disappointing Old Navy performance
signals.summary: Gap issued mixed results as sales at its largest brand, Old Navy, fell short of estimates.

signals.title: What the streaming wars can teach utilities about the AI data center boom
signals.summary: Utilities can avoid making the same mistakes major studios made in the Netflix era, but only if they view the AI boom as a systemwide modernization challenge rather than an overflowing queue of individual projects, writes Abbey O’Brien at Ulteig.

signals.title: Demand management, data center flexibility boost regional reliability: NERC
signals.summary: The reliability watchdog dropped its forecast for ERCOT’s net internal demand by 3.7 GW, or 4.6%, compared with last summer, “because more data centers can be curtailed by grid operators when needed to prevent grid emergencies.”
